name: Is hearing loss from workplace noise permanent partial disability?
description: Yes, PPI based on audiogram impairment rating.[1]

mainEntity.name: Is hearing loss from workplace noise permanent partial disability?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, PPI based on audiogram impairment rating.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, noise-induced hearing loss often qualifies for permanent partial impairment (PPI) benefits based on audiometric ratings.** Utah and Idaho compensate using AMA Guides for percentage loss, covering medical care and wage replacement.[1][2] Ratings consider binaural impairment; even mild loss pays if proven occupational.[1] No lost time needed for PPI. Ratings drive payout amounts.
